title: Our Journey
subtitle: From a two-person team to a full-service software studio.

milestones.title: Founded in Phnom Penh
milestones.description: Started as a two-person development team focused on landing pages and small business websites.

milestones.title: First Major Client Partnership
milestones.description: Delivered the MR Training & Jobs Center website and began long-term collaboration on internal management systems.

milestones.title: Product Suite Expansion
milestones.description: Launched MR Labs, MR HRM, and VersionDragon — moving from websites to full-stack web applications.

milestones.title: Team & Capability Growth
milestones.description: Scaled to a 6-person team with dedicated design, frontend, backend, and project management capabilities.

milestones.title: SaaS & Provincial Expansion
milestones.description: Target: Launch first independent SaaS product and expand gov-tech partnerships beyond Phnom Penh.
